creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Looks like this was fixed in:

commit 1032f7b82bec6cc2ea895af87f1913de55185a1a
Author: Eugene Grosbein <eugen@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Fri Nov 20 09:56:46 2020 +0000

    bzgrep: make flag --no-filename work
    
    PR:             248813
    MFC after:      1 week

Notes:
    svn path=/head/; revision=367866

which did not make it into 12.2, but is in 12.3 which will be released soon so this will be fixed by upgrading.
